message:
chore(artifacts): add verification evidence for 19 campaign and gate runs

Captures structured verification artifacts from recent gate runs and sprint
campaigns. These JSON/TOML evidence files provide an auditable record of
pass/fail verdicts, timing data, and configuration snapshots used during
quality gate evaluation.

New artifact sets:
- adversarial_campaign_gate/20260226T172217Z — adversarial suppression gate
- compiler_hotspot_optimization_campaign — compiler optimization gate
- frx_04_3_hybrid_lane_router_guards — hybrid lane router guards
- frx_04_4_replay_failover_incident — replay failover incident exercise
- frx_ecosystem_compatibility_matrix — ecosystem compatibility matrix
- frx_incremental_adoption_controls — incremental adoption controls
- frx_pilot_rollout_harness — pilot rollout harness verification
- frx_test_logging_schema — test logging schema validation
- frx_track_c_js_runtime_lane_mvp_sprint (2 runs) — JS runtime lane
- frx_track_d_wasm_lane_hybrid_router_sprint — WASM hybrid router
- frx_track_f_toolchain_ecosystem_adoption_sprint (3 runs) — toolchain
- frx_unit_test_taxonomy_contract — unit test taxonomy contract
- frx_unit_test_taxonomy_fixture_registry — fixture registry validation
- parser_cross_arch_repro_matrix — cross-architecture reproducibility
- parser_operator_developer_runbook — operator runbook gate
- parser_third_party_rerun_kit — third-party rerun kit validation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
